reviews.comment:
Pasé un domingo al mediodía a cargar combustible y estaban las islas cerradas. Tuve que seguir viaje hasta Formosa.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped by on a Sunday at midday to refuel, but the islands were closed. I had to continue my journey to Formosa.

reviews.comment:
La NAFTA más cara. Premium solamente a $170 (11/07/2022). Coca cola a $500. Asaltoooo. Pero si no te queda otra. Atención regular.

(Translated by Google)
The most expensive NAFTA. Premium is only $170 (July 11, 2022). Coca-Cola is $500. Robbery. But if you have no other choice, then average service.

reviews.comment:
Pasé ayer 10am y no había combustible y no es la primera vez. Usamos el baño, debe ser el más sucio que vi. Recomendaciones para viajeros seguir hasta la Shell que está en la ciudad.

(Translated by Google)
I went by yesterday at 10 am and there was no fuel, and it's not the first time. We used the bathroom; it must be the dirtiest I've ever seen. My recommendation for travelers is to continue on to the Shell station in town.
